section_miscategorizations.text: He has hypertension and diabetes mellitus.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is acceptable as part of the problem list/assessment, but it is not clearly tied to the current visit's assessment. It could also reasonably belong in S or O as past medical history; however, its placement in A does not substantially mislead.

This is a management decision (explicit instruction to continue a medication) and is correctly placed in the Plan. If it were purely a statement of current medication use, it would belong in S, but framed as a treatment decision it is appropriate here.
